title: Login page not loading
description: Users are unable to access the login page after the latest deployment.

title: Payment gateway timeout
description: Payment requests are timing out during checkout.

title: Profile image upload issue
description: Customers cannot upload profile pictures larger than 2MB.

title: Dashboard data mismatch
description: Sales reports on the dashboard are showing incorrect totals.

title: Email notifications delayed
description: System email notifications are delayed by several hours.

title: Mobile app crashes on launch
description: Android users report crashes immediately after opening the app.

title: Search functionality slow
description: Product search takes more than 10 seconds to return results.

title: API authentication failure
description: Third-party integrations are failing due to token validation errors.

title: Broken link in help center
description: The FAQ section contains links returning 404 errors.

title: Subscription renewal failed
description: Recurring billing is not processing for monthly subscribers.

title: Incorrect timezone display
description: Meeting schedules are displayed in the wrong timezone for EU users.

title: Export to CSV not working
description: Users receive an error when exporting reports to CSV format.
